Rendering Point Clouds with Compute Shaders

tech_of_day.name: WebGL
tech_of_day.summary: WebGL (short for Web Graphics Library) is a JavaScript API for rendering interactive 2D and 3D graphics within any compatible web browser without the use of plug-ins. It is based on OpenGL ES and executed on the computer's GPU.
